title: Mission Control Smoke Test
description: Small mission used to smoke test the Mission Control CLI workflow.

milestones.title: Smoke Setup
milestones.description: Create and advance a single feature through the workflow.

features.title: Run smoke feature
features.description: Exercise prompt generation, state transition, and checkpoint handling.
verificationSteps: Create the mission from this plan file
Approve the mission and list features
Advance the feature to in-progress and verify the update
fulfills: Smoke workflow can create and advance a feature
